Second Guess.Action: Replace final queued action after storm phase

0.TEXT: Is there really someone out there trying to make the storms worse?
0.PAIR_TEXT: always someone out there trying to make it worse...or better. same results in the end

1.TEXT: readings comin outta the deadzone are wild tonight, yall seein this?

2.TEXT: City of Angels checking in, any good anomalies tonight?
2.PAIR_TEXT: some psycho is roaming the deadzone right now scanning. doin' the LORDS WORK

3.TEXT: saw my first ghost, need a hug

4.TEXT: The long night is here, ladies and gents, the airwaves welcomes us all...

5.TEXT: Any seen BBD tonight? Interested to hear what he thinks about these Deadzone readings going on
5.PAIR_TEXT: Watching the readings with baited breath. What mysteries will we uncover?

6.TEXT: I heard a guy on the Big Baghdady Show talking about HAARP, you think that has something to do with these storms?
6.PAIR_TEXT: that guest was a weirdo, don't listen to that HAARP crap

7.TEXT: Picking up a lot of static tonight. Solar storm?

8.TEXT: Red Rooster checkin in from I-10, just ran over somethin that looks like a coyote but with a cactus head.
8.PAIR_TEXT: the new evolution is here and they are hungry

9.TEXT: do any of yall think the deadzone is like growing?

10.TEXT: angellic forces out tonight, im picking up a ton of readings just off the coast

11.TEXT: one hell of a storm brewing out in what used to be kansas, that one of you jokesters?

12.TEXT: ever get the feeling that every thought you've ever had was just some dude typing in a spreadsheet?
12.PAIR_TEXT: Go to sleep, SS. For the love of the gods please go offline

13.TEXT: this is the wildest thing ive seen, WHAT ARE THEY DOIN OUT THERE?!

14.TEXT: just pulled a tarot card...three of swords. thats not a fun one, is it?
14.PAIR_TEXT: dont be disheartened, anything can be a positive

15.TEXT: Whatever happened to that expert BBD had on a while back who was talking about exploring the Impact site in Colorado?
15.PAIR_TEXT: i heard she went over the Rim and never came back O__O

16.TEXT: not seeing what the big fuss is, just more destruction for destructions sake. do something better with your life!

17.TEXT: I mean, if I was going to go out in a blaze of thunder and fire, that would be the one.

18.TEXT: what is sleep? not something im allowed to experience, i guess

19.TEXT: Northern lights coming further and further south. Sign of the end times maybe?
19.PAIR_TEXT: You think that would be the giant rock that destroyed Colorado...

20.TEXT: Late night jams, what are people listening to?
20.PAIR_TEXT: Isn't Big Baghdady broadcasting soon? Can't miss that...

21.TEXT: This is Rocket, checking in from the base of the Sierras

22.TEXT: how do these stormchasers even survive out there? seems dangerous

23.TEXT: Hell yeah, STORMRUN-R! Picked a good night to take off work

24.TEXT: Whoa! Anyone in the NE see the sky light up just now?
24.PAIR_TEXT: YUP! All my equipment just went WILD!

26.TEXT: These storm jams are sick, hitting the right frequency! Props.

27.TEXT: Please, gentle callers, turn down your radios...
